# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: kube-system
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
    component: centralized-logging
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  updateStrategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
        component: centralized-logging
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: logging-agent
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      # Run with a non-root user where possible
      securityContext:
        runAsUser: 0
        runAsGroup: 0
        fsGroup: 0
      tolerations:
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/master
          effect: NoSchedule
      containers:
        - name: logging-agent
          image: fluent/fluentd:v1.16-debian-1
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 200Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 500Mi
          securityContext:
            # Read-only root filesystem to prevent writes to container filesystem
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            # Prevent privilege escalation
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            # Drop all capabilities, add only what is needed
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
              add:
                - DAC_READ_SEARCH
            # Cannot gain new privileges via setuid/setgid
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          env:
            - name: NODE_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: spec.nodeName
          volumeMounts:
            # Mount host /var/log as read-only to collect system and container logs
            - name: varlog
              mountPath: /var/log
              readOnly: true
            # Mount host /var/lib/docker as read-only to access container log files
            - name: varlibdocker
              mountPath: /var/lib/docker
              readOnly: true
            # Writable directory for fluentd buffer and position files
            - name: buffer
              mountPath: /fluentd/buffer
            # Writable tmp directory for fluentd
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            # Writable directory for fluentd position tracking
            - name: pos-files
              mountPath: /var/log/fluentd-pos
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /fluentd.pod.healthcheck?json=%7B%22log%22%3A+%22health+check%22%7D
              port: 9880
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /fluentd.pod.healthcheck?json=%7B%22log%22%3A+%22health+check%22%7D
              port: 9880
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9880
              name: http-healthcheck
              protocol: TCP
      volumes:
        # Host path volume for /var/log - mounted read-only in container
        - name: varlog
          hostPath:
            path: /var/log
            type: Directory
        # Host path volume for /var/lib/docker - mounted read-only in container
        - name: varlibdocker
          hostPath:
            path: /var/lib/docker
            type: Directory
        # EmptyDir for fluentd buffer (not persisted on host)
        - name: buffer
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 500Mi
        # EmptyDir for tmp files
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
        # EmptyDir for position files tracking log read positions
        - name: pos-files
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 50Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: kube-system
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-netpol
  namespace: kube-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    # Allow DNS resolution
    - ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP
    # Allow sending logs to centralized logging backend (e.g., Elasticsearch)
    - ports:
        - port: 9200
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 443
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 24224
          protocol: TCP
